name: josehollow-design-system
description: Web Components design system built with AtomicoJS

scripts.test:button: npm run build:button && web-test-runner components/button/button.test.js --config components/button/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.test:icon: npm run build:icon && web-test-runner components/icon/icon.test.js --config components/icon/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:tag: npm run build:icon && vite build --config components/tag/vite.config.js
scripts.test:tag: npm run build:tag && web-test-runner components/tag/tag.test.js --config components/tag/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:badge: npm run build:icon && vite build --config components/badge/vite.config.js
scripts.test:badge: npm run build:badge && web-test-runner components/badge/badge.test.js --config components/badge/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.test:loading: npm run build:loading && web-test-runner components/loading/loading.test.js --config components/loading/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.test:checkbox: npm run build:checkbox && web-test-runner components/checkbox/checkbox.test.js --config components/checkbox/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.test:radio: npm run build:radio && web-test-runner components/radio/radio.test.js --config components/radio/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:input: npm run build:icon && vite build --config components/input/vite.config.js
scripts.test:input: npm run build:input && web-test-runner components/input/input.test.js --config components/input/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.test:textarea: npm run build:textarea && web-test-runner components/textarea/textarea.test.js --config components/textarea/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:select: npm run build:icon && vite build --config components/select/vite.config.js
scripts.test:select: npm run build:select && web-test-runner components/select/select.test.js --config components/select/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:card-details: npm run build:icon && npm run build:button && vite build --config components/card-details/vite.config.js
scripts.build:card-deal: npm run build:icon && npm run build:button && npm run build:tag && vite build --config components/card-deal/vite.config.js
scripts.test:card-deal: npm run build:card-deal && web-test-runner components/card-deal/card-deal.test.js --config components/card-deal/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:accordions: npm run build:checkbox && vite build --config components/accordions/vite.config.js
scripts.test:accordions: npm run build:accordions && web-test-runner components/accordions/accordions.test.js --config components/accordions/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:file-uploader: npm run build:icon && npm run build:button && vite build --config components/file-uploader/vite.config.js
scripts.build:menu-vertical: npm run build:icon && npm run build:button && vite build --config components/menu-vertical/vite.config.js
scripts.test:message: npm run build:message && web-test-runner components/message/message.test.js --config components/message/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:direct-access: npm run build:icon && vite build --config components/direct-access/vite.config.js
scripts.build:pagination: npm run build:icon && vite build --config components/pagination/vite.config.js
scripts.test:pagination: npm run build:pagination && web-test-runner components/pagination/pagination.test.js --config components/pagination/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:modal: npm run build:icon && npm run build:button && vite build --config components/modal/vite.config.js
scripts.test:modal: npm run build:modal && web-test-runner components/modal/modal.test.js --config components/modal/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.test:datepicker: npm run build:datepicker && web-test-runner components/datepicker/datepicker.test.js --config components/datepicker/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:timepicker: npm run build:radio && vite build --config components/timepicker/vite.config.js
scripts.test:timepicker: npm run build:timepicker && web-test-runner components/timepicker/timepicker.test.js --config components/timepicker/web-test-runner.mjs
scripts.build:all-components: npm run build:icon && npm run build:button && npm run build:tag && npm run build:badge && npm run build:loading && npm run build:checkbox && npm run build:radio && npm run build:input && npm run build:textarea && npm run build:select && npm run build:accordions
